query:
SELECT c.title as course, COUNT(qq.id) as question_count 
FROM courses c 
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId 
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions qq ON l.id = qq.lessonId 
GROUP BY c.id, c.title 
ORDER BY c.id
command:

LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId 
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions qq ON l.id = qq.lessonId
